gist.headline: The hive's new honeypot
gist.blurb: DecoyNet just landed in our Dev Tools! It uses a clever dual-LLM honeypot to keep scammers busy and extract actionable intel for fraud prevention.
gist.summary: Added DecoyNet, an intelligent dual-LLM honeypot application that detects and engages scammers, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now explore DecoyNet in the Dev Tools section to see how AI models can be combined to build automated fraud prevention systems.
gist.visual_concept: A literal honeypot (pot of honey) mixed with server/tech elements to represent the security honeypot. Polly the bee acting as a detective or security guard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny detective hat, inspecting a glowing digital honeypot sitting on top of a retro server rack. The chunky pixel robot companion holds a magnifying glass, looking closely at the honey. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

The chunky pixel robot companion holds a magnifying glass, looking closely at the honey. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background.
